sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(date AS DATE)) AS opening_month, COUNT(account_id) AS new_accounts FROM account WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(date AS DATE)) BETWEEN 1993 AND 1998 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1; SELECT frequency, COUNT(account_id) AS new_accounts FROM account WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(date AS DATE)) BETWEEN 1993 AND 1998 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY new_accounts DESC; SELECT d.A2 AS district, DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CAST(a.date AS DATE)) AS opening_quarter, COUNT(a.account_id) AS new_accounts FROM account a JOIN district d ON d.district_id=a.district_id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(a.date AS DATE))=1996 GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS active_accounts_as_of_1998_12_31 FROM trans WHERE CAST(date AS DATE) <= DATE '1998-12-31';

filters: active accounts with transaction on or before 1998-12-31
chart_spec.layout_intent: Branch manager view with KPI first, long-term opening trend as the main chart, and frequency mix plus district-quarter heatmap below.
